decision_description: No milestones were found in either wp_structure.json or milestones_seed.json during Phase 4 milestone consistency validation (run 575bfa12). The milestone-consistency-check skill executed in DEGRADED mode, validated_scope restricted to wp_structure only, and found 0 milestones to evaluate. The finding is flagged: 'No milestones found in wp_structure.json or milestones_seed.json; cannot perform milestone consistency validation.' The Phase 4 gate condition requires all milestones to carry a defined verifiable criterion and all tasks to be assigned to months. With milestone definitions entirely absent from Tier 3 architecture inputs (milestones_seed.json) and not synthesised in the Phase 3 WP structure output, the gate condition cannot be evaluated. This gap constitutes a blocking deficiency in Tier 3 architecture inputs for Phase 4 and must be declared rather than papered over. No milestones have been written to docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/milestones_seed.json as a Phase 4 required output.
tier_authority_applied: CLAUDE.md §7 Phase 4 gate condition — required inputs include milestones_seed.json from docs/tier3_project_instantiation/architecture_inputs/; gate condition states 'All milestones have a defined verifiable criterion' and 'Timeline fits within the call-specified duration'; CLAUDE.md §12.4 requires missing mandatory inputs to trigger a gate failure and not be papered over
rationale: The milestone-consistency-check validation report (docs/tier4_orchestration_state/validation_reports/milestone-consistency-check_575bfa12.json) records zero milestones checked and one flagged finding indicating complete absence of milestone data in both source artifacts. The Phase 4 required inputs specified in CLAUDE.md §7 include milestones_seed.json from Tier 3 architecture inputs. The scheduling_constraints.json artifact (run 575bfa12) was successfully derived from wp_structure.json and establishes WP bounds and strict task constraints, but milestone definitions are a distinct required input that was not present. CLAUDE.md §6 rule 5 states that if a phase cannot complete because required inputs are absent, the system must declare a gate failure and halt — it must not fabricate completion. CLAUDE.md §12.4 confirms that missing mandatory inputs must trigger a gate failure, not be papered over. This decision log entry records the gap as an unresolved blocking condition requiring human operator action to populate milestones_seed.json before Phase 4 can gate-pass.
